text:
A detailed guide for the mechanics in Hunter × Hunter Greed Adventure game, which is no longer available. For the general game guide, see the Hunter × Hunter Greed Adventure Guide.

Passive Buffs

Passives in this game work with a point-based system. Every card and every character will have a certain amount of points towards one or more passives that will affect the character. Passive buffs' efficacy is based on the amount of points you have.

Requirements to gain the passives are the following :
2 points for level 1
7 points for level 2
10 points for level 3
Some passives can also reach levels 4 and 5. Here are the requirements for these passives :
14 points for level 4
20 points for level 5
For example, to gain the "Shield Breaker" passive, you need a minimum of 2 points to get the level 1 Shield breaker passive. This will increase your damage against shields by 50%.

At 7 points you would gain level 2 which would increase the damage done to shields by 200% and at level 3 it increases damage to shields by 300%.

There is no limit to how many passives you can have on a character at once. There also is no bonus if you have a level 2 passive with 9 points instead of 7, which would be the requirement for a level 2 passive.

Gimmick Counter Buffs

Restriction Removal (対束縛の極意)
During the "Restrict" gimmick, the enemy reduces all characters' movement speed and attack speed. The enemy also increases the duration of cooldowns.
Level 1: Reduces restrict gimmicks effects
Level 2: Negates restrict gimmicks
Level 3: Negates restrict gimmicks and increases movement speed by 25%
Lock Counter (対停止の極意)
During the "Lock" gimmick, the enemy locks all characters, making them unable to move, attack or switch.
Level 1: Reduces lock gimmicks duration
Level 2: Negates lock gimmicks
Level 3: Negates lock gimmicks and increases attack by 25% for 15 seconds after the activation of a lock gimmick
Shield Breaker (対守護の極意)
During the "Shield" gimmick, the enemy casts a shield, becoming invulnerable to damage and skills' effects until the shield is destroyed.
Level 1: Increases damage dealt to shields by 50%
Level 2: Increases damage dealt to shields by 200%
Level 3: Increases damage dealt to shields by 300%
Enhance Stop (対増強の極意)
During the "Enhance" gimmick, the enemy prepares a powerful skill or buff for a few seconds. It can only be cancelled by dealing a certain amount of hits on this enemy.
Level 1: Adds 1 hitcount to attacks during enhance gimmicks
Level 2: Adds 5 hitcounts to attacks during enhance gimmicks
Level 3: Adds 25 hitcounts to attacks during enhance gimmicks
Anti Drain (対吸念の極意)
During the "Drain" gimmick, the enemy gradually drains all characters' AP at regular intervals.
Level 1: Reduces drain gimmicks effects
Level 2: Negates drain gimmicks
Level 3: Negates drain gimmicks and increases AP recovery by 30%

Level 2: Increases HP by 6%
Level 3: Increases HP by 8%

Rock Resistance (対グーの防守)

Level 2: Reduces damages received from Rock attributes by 4%

Level 5: Reduces damages received from Rock attributes by 12%

Level 2: Reduces damages received from Scissors attributes by 4%

Level 4: Damage given during critical hits increased by 15%

Poison Subjugation (毒の強撃)
Level 1: Damage given to poisoned enemies is increased by 4%
Level 2: Damage given to poisoned enemies is increased by 6%
Level 3: Damage given to poisoned enemies is increased by 8%
Level 4: Damage given to poisoned enemies is increased by 12%
Level 5: Damage given to poisoned enemies is increased by 18%
Weakness Subjugation (背水の強撃)
Level 1: Increases damage by 10% when HP is below 30%
Level 2: Increases damage by 15% when HP is below 30%
Level 3: Increases damage by 20% when HP is below 30%
Level 4: Increases damage by 25% when HP is below 30%
Level 5: Increases damage by 30% when HP is below 30%

Skill Effects

Skills used by cards or characters can have various effects besides inflicting damage. Moreover some of these effects are needed to interrupt yellow warning attacks.

Stat Buffs

Damage Increase: Increases your damage.
Damage Taken Decrease: Reduces damage taken.
This buff can be stacked up to 50%. When it is used with damage decrease debuff, the total damage reduction is capped at 90%.
Move Speed Increase: Increase your move speed.
Critical Rate Increase: Increases your critical rate.

Regeneration

Burst Heal: User instantly heals a certain amount of HP.
Gradual Heal: User gradually heals a certain amount of targets' HP.
AP Recovery: User regenerates a certain amount of AP.

Crowd Controls

Stun: Target is unable to move and attack.
Blow Back: Target is blown away and can't move while being blown away.
Temporary Disable: Target is unable to move or attack for a short period of time (does not work against bosses).
Attract: Target is moved toward the attacker and can't move away.
Knock Down: Target is moved backward, knocked down, and can't move during the knockdown.

Stat Debuffs

Damage Decrease: Target's damage decreases.
This debuff can be stacked up to 50%. When it is used with damage taken decrease buff, the total damage reduction is capped at 90%.
Damage Taken Increase: Target receives increased damage.
This debuff can be stacked up to 100%.
Move Speed Decrease: Target's move speed decreases.
Critical Vulnerability Increase: Target has more chance to receive critical hits.

Other

Counter: The user takes a defensive stance halving damage taken for a few seconds. If he is attacked, he will retaliate.
Transfer: The user transfers his own buffs to allies.
Poison: Keeps inflicting a certain amount of damage to poisoned enemies for a certain period of time.
Counter Buff: The user will get a buff if he is attacked.
Taunt: The user forces enemies to attack himself.
